originalTitle: Let's land Musk's rocket with RL
title: Porting Legacy Rocket Landing Environment to PufferLib Modern API
summary: Worked on modernizing a 7-year-old rocket landing environment from Python 3.5 to PufferLib's native gym API, replacing legacy rendering with Raylib and stripping unused code. Got basic rendering and training running but performance was bottlenecked by Python physics, requiring a future C port.
